_meta.description: Amplify — Home dashboard redesign seed data. All widget data for assessor and manager role views.

data_status.DASH_DATA_const: lives in const DASH_DATA at JS position ~315k
data_status.inline_data: 9 objects defined inside renderDashboard() — listed under inlineData below
data_status.real_data_sources: TASKS object, D object (cases/sw), REQS object, CASE_META object

DASH_DATA._note: This is the existing const DASH_DATA object. Only kpis, cards, cases, and activity arrays come from here. All other widget data is in inlineData below.

assessor.headline: Today's control priorities
assessor.sub: Unblock review, protect SLA, and move decisions forward.
assessor._activity24hNote: Empty — assessor had no activity in the last 24h. Renders empty-state illustration.

manager.headline: Portfolio health & team priorities
manager.sub: Monitor team workload, SLA risk, and escalations across all cases.

activity24h.action: APS chase sent to Dr. Kowalski (2nd request)
Tele-interview confirmed for Elena Rossi May 17
FCE escalation flag raised — 35 days overdue

activityWeek.action: Scoring generated — +75 debits, rated offer likely
MIB hit reviewed — traditional UW path confirmed

inlineData._note: These 9 objects are currently defined inline inside renderDashboard(). They should be moved to DASH_DATA or a separate const for maintainability. Currently hardcoded — see gaps section.

trendArrows._purpose: Trend arrow and context label shown below each KPI chip value
trendArrows._clsValues: up=red text (bad), down=green text (good — value went down), ok=green text (positive direction)

briefTexts._purpose: AI daily brief narrative paragraph — shown in the purple strip at top of dashboard body
briefTexts.assessor: Two cases are at their SLA deadline today — both decision-ready with AI confidence above 90%. The single blocker holding most value is the FCE on Billy Bud's case, now 35 days overdue. Your highest-value action today: approve the Dupont $500K payout.
briefTexts.manager: Victor Ramon has two decisions ready for your countersign totalling $1M in exposure. Both cleared AI review with 91–96% confidence. Marc Tremblay's APS is 2 days overdue — consider escalation to medical director if no response by end of day.

briefActions._purpose: CTA link shown at bottom of the AI daily brief strip

progressData._purpose: Data for the weekly progress ring SVG and streak/velocity row
progressData._ringFormula: dashArray = (pct/100) * (2 * Math.PI * 28). Ring radius R=28, cx=cy=34.
progressData._ringColor: pct>=80 → var(--green-b), pct>=50 → var(--blue-b), else var(--amber-b)
progressData._velDirValues: up → ti-trending-up icon, down → ti-trending-down, flat → ti-trending-right

stageProgress._purpose: Drives the segmented stage progress bars in the case health panel. Values match D[key].sw array.
stageProgress._derivedFrom: D[caseKey].sw — count stages with s.s==='done', s.s==='active', remainder='next'

blockerData._purpose: The red blocker bar anchored to the bottom of the case health panel

assessor.items: FCE overdue 35d · Earnings verification · APS pending
assessor._derivedFrom: count of REQS with status='overdue' across assessor's cases. val = sum of face amounts of those cases.

manager.items: FCE 35d · APS 2d · Earnings · Decline letter · Tele-interview
manager._derivedFrom: count of all REQS with status='overdue' or 'not_started' blocking a decision stage, across all cases.

focusData._purpose: The single priority focus card. One task per role — the highest-impact action available.

assessor.title: Approve $500,000 death benefit payout — Thomas Dupont
assessor.ai: All requirements met. MIB comparison complete — no discrepancies. Contestability lapsed (6y 11m). ACH routing verified. Recommend approval.

manager.title: Countersign required — WOP rider approval, Billy Bud
manager.ai: Victor Ramon recommends approval. Total disability confirmed. Decision exceeds Band 3 authority — your countersign releases the monthly premium waiver ($38/mo, retroactive Jan 30).

velData._purpose: Team velocity rows in the manager right column. Queue trend per assessor via trendLabel badge.
velData._trendValues: warn=red badge, ok=green badge, flat=gray badge

metricBars._purpose: Three-bar performance metrics shown in the weekly progress panel (bottom of right column for assessor, inside progress panel for manager).
metricBars._clsValues: empty string → var(--blue-b) fill, 'amber' → var(--amber-b) fill, 'red' → var(--red-b) fill

activityDotClasses._purpose: CSS class suffix for colored dot on each activity row
activityDotClasses._rule: If actor === 'AI Agent' → 'ai'. If actor === 'System' → 'system'. Otherwise → 'human'.

realDataDerivations._note: How each hardcoded value should ultimately be computed from the real data objects.

progressData.assessor.done.formula: count of tasks where assignee === currentUser && status === 'done'

stageProgress.formula: stagesDone[k] = sw.filter(s => s.s === 'done').length; stagesActive[k] = sw.filter(s => s.s === 'active').length; stagesTotal[k] = sw.length

blockerData.count.formula: count of requirements where status === 'overdue' across all cases in current user scope

blockerData.val.formula: sum of D[caseKey].val for each case that has at least one overdue requirement

focusData.formula: filter tasks where status === 'in_queue' && priority === 'high', sort by AI confidence desc, pick [0]

metricBars.assessorWeekly.SLA compliance.formula: count(cases where SLA not breached) / total cases * 100

metricBars.assessorWeekly.AI alignment.formula: count(completed tasks where human decision matched AI recommendedOptionId) / count(completed decision tasks) * 100
